title: Mixed-positive workplace feedback with an optional public revision addendum

target_scope.reason: The evaluator is distinguished within the vignette, but the residence of any evaluator-specific history effect remains open.

stimulus.base_surface: 방향은 좋지만 이번 결과는 기대에 못 미쳤습니다.

public_record.statement: The evaluator said that the direction was good.
The evaluator said that the current result did not meet expectations.

world_unknowns.statement: The evaluator's actual motive is not established by the feedback alone.
The objective quality of the work is not certified by this vignette.

levels.descriptor: Immediately before receiving the feedback, the recipient reports low evaluation threat.

level_specific_public_record.statement: The recipient reports low evaluation threat immediately before receiving the feedback.

levels.descriptor: Immediately before receiving the feedback, the recipient reports high evaluation threat.

level_specific_public_record.statement: The recipient reports high evaluation threat immediately before receiving the feedback.

levels.descriptor: Across prior comparable evaluations, this evaluator applied the same stated criteria consistently.

level_specific_public_record.statement: Across prior comparable evaluations, this evaluator applied the same stated criteria consistently.

levels.descriptor: Across prior comparable evaluations, this evaluator changed or omitted the stated criteria between evaluations.

level_specific_public_record.statement: Across prior comparable evaluations, this evaluator changed or omitted the stated criteria between evaluations.

levels.descriptor: No revision-information addendum is delivered after the base feedback.

level_specific_public_record.statement: Only the base feedback sentence is delivered; no revision-information addendum is added.

levels.descriptor: The evaluator adds three directly checkable revision items after the base feedback.

level_specific_public_record.statement: The evaluator adds: ‘출처, 단위 환산, 근거와 결론의 연결을 수정해 주세요.’

held_constant_across_cube: The identity of evaluator and recipient within the vignette
The submitted work item and evaluation occasion
Sleep, workload, deadline history, bodily state, review time, and response opportunity
The absence of any revision outcome at the first observation

author_origin_possibilities.statement: The feedback may be experienced as a bounded request for revision while preserving a sense that the direction is viable.
The same base sentence may be experienced as global devaluation, unresolved evaluation threat, or mixed criticism and opportunity.

phenomenological_expectations.statement: Task-focused revision, global self-evaluation, suspicion of the evaluator, and deferred judgment are permitted possibilities rather than cell answers.
The same professional acknowledgement may occur under different unresolved interpretations and later trajectories.

normative_invariants.statement: Reported evaluation threat and evaluator criterion history do not change the words delivered; the public-feedback-addendum factor changes only the declared addendum record.
Feeling criticized or supported does not certify work quality, evaluator motive, or future evaluation outcome.
A professional immediate reply does not identify the recipient's felt encounter, interpretation, or intent.

open_discriminators.question: Does the reported evaluation-threat difference relate to material admission, encounter formation, later candidate selection, or some distinguishable combination?
Does evaluator history require an evaluator-scoped residence, or can the same selective effects arise from accessed prior material without it?
Which later trace differences, if any, are selectively attributable to the declared public revision-information addendum rather than reported evaluation threat or evaluator criterion history?

prohibited_claims: A negative felt response proves that the evaluator is hostile.
A positive felt response proves that the work is adequate.
Evaluator criterion history or a reported threat level may rewrite the public feedback record.
Any cell has a correct hidden mechanism or correct professional reply.

same_immediate_projection_claim.statement: It remains open whether these cells can share this immediate professional surface while retaining a future-discriminable path; the illustration is a design-only anchor, not participant-facing or a correct reply.

probe_options: After revision, the evaluator identifies the corrected criteria and acknowledges improvement.
After revision, the evaluator repeats global dissatisfaction without new criteria.
future_probe.open_question: Would at least one later access, interpretation, or action-affordance trace diverge under either event despite the same immediate surface?
